nodes.label: Phase 1: Image Generation Layer
nodes.description: gpt-image-1 + Ollama Diffuser + ImageRouter. Weeks 1-2.

nodes.label: Phase 2: PPT MCP Bridge
nodes.description: Office-PowerPoint-MCP-Server + python-pptx. Weeks 3-4.

nodes.label: Phase 3: Ghost Session UX
nodes.description: Streaming cancel, ghost preview, undo, alternatives, Yjs CRDT. Weeks 5-6.

nodes.label: Phase 4: Launch & Distribution
nodes.description: kairo-mcp server, one-liner install, demo video, VC readiness.

nodes.label: phantom-core (Rust)
nodes.description: Single binary. cargo install kairo-phantom.

nodes.label: Swarm Brain
nodes.description: Multi-agent orchestrator. Routes to Design/Prose/Code/Image agent.

nodes.label: Context Engine
nodes.description: AppFingerprinter + DocumentContext extraction.

nodes.label: Injector
nodes.description: Clipboard + UIA SetValue + MCP routes (Adeu/Notion/Figma).

nodes.label: CRDT Session (Yrs)
nodes.description: Yjs-compatible CRDT for collaborative AI peer mode.

nodes.label: Hotkey Listener (Alt+M)
nodes.description: Global hotkey via rdev. Triggers Ghost Session.

nodes.label: image_pipeline.rs
nodes.description: ImageRouter with cloud/local backends.

nodes.label: OpenAI gpt-image-1
nodes.description: Cloud: returns base64 PNG. Title slides, hero images.

nodes.label: gpt-image-1-mini
nodes.description: Cloud: faster/cheaper. Icons, thumbnails.

nodes.label: Ollama Stable Diffusion
nodes.description: Local: Stable Diffusion / FLUX via Ollama API.

nodes.label: ImageRouter
nodes.description: Smart routing: offline? → local. Title slide? → cloud HQ. Icon? → mini.

nodes.label: Image Clipboard Inject
nodes.description: write_image_to_clipboard() → Ctrl+V into Word/PPT/Figma.

nodes.label: office-pptx-bridge (Python)
nodes.description: MCP stdio server. Wraps python-pptx for full PPTX manipulation.

nodes.label: python-pptx
nodes.description: create_presentation, add_slide, add_picture, read_slide_text.

nodes.label: figma-mcp-go Bridge
nodes.description: 73 tools. import_image(base64), create_text, set_fills.

nodes.label: Canva Connect API
nodes.description: POST /v1/autofills. Image placeholder injection.

nodes.label: easy-notion-mcp
nodes.description: 25 block types. Append, update, round-trip fidelity.

nodes.label: Adeu MCP (DOCX Track Changes)
nodes.description: Native DOCX redlining without breaking formatting.

nodes.label: ghost_session.rs
nodes.description: Full Ghost Session lifecycle: stream → review → accept/cancel.

nodes.label: CancellationToken (Esc)
nodes.description: tokio_util CancellationToken. Esc immediately aborts stream.

nodes.label: GhostBuffer (Alt A/B)
nodes.description: Two alternatives. word-by-word accept (Ctrl+Right).

nodes.label: UndoManager (Ctrl+Z)
nodes.description: Agent-aware undo. One Ctrl+Z reverts entire AI operation.

nodes.label: Confidence Bands
nodes.description: High/Medium/Low. Changes available actions. Trust calibration.

nodes.label: Yjs CRDT Peer
nodes.description: AI joins as WebSocket peer with clientID. Real-time collab.

nodes.label: Inline Correction (Ctrl+/)
nodes.description: Mini-prompt overlay. Re-streams with correction.

nodes.label: kairo-mcp Server
nodes.description: MCP stdio server exposing 5 tools for Claude Code/Cursor/Goose.

nodes.label: MCP Tools (5)
nodes.description: kairo_read_context, kairo_ghost_write, kairo_ask, kairo_detect_app, kairo_generate_image.

nodes.label: install.py (One-liner)
nodes.description: Cross-platform installer. Checks Rust, Ollama, builds binary.

nodes.label: 90s Demo Video
nodes.description: Word → PPT → Figma → Terminal. Single continuous take. Launch asset.

nodes.label: Enterprise / VC Readiness
nodes.description: SSO, audit logging, plugin governance, private registries.
